full_text:
Wang Gong 王肱
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Gong (王肱). Grand Administrator of Dong commandery. He was unable to resist the Black Mountain Bandits. Wang Gong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Liu Dai.
